channel.title: Policy & Security Think Tank Updates
channel.description: Custom RSS feed from CSIS, CFR, and other policy institutions

item.title: New Rhythms in GEO: A Quantitative Analysis of Unusual Behavior in Geosynchronous Orbit by Chinese Satellites, 2016–2025
item.description: Geostationary orbit used to be a parking lot. Some Chinese satellites are circling the lot, tailgating other cars, and pulling into spots that aren't theirs. This report explores nine years of data on what these satellites have been doing.

item.title: The Texas Energy Reference Design: Stress-Testing Load Growth Challenges for an AI Century
item.description: Texas has its own grid and its own rules. Now, it is the high-stakes laboratory for the national AI race. With 410 GW in the queue, the nation should watch this massive load growth story unfurl.

item.title: The Alluring Potential of an Integrated Venezuelan Gas Industry
item.description: Venezuela’s vast gas reserves have long been stranded. Political change in Caracas could revive partnership with Trinidad, unlocking LNG for Europe, strengthening Western Hemisphere integration, and adding an Atlantic Basin supply option amid diversification efforts.
